title: PCR Fragment Generation (for inserts)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8fo50","text":"Protocol to generate inserts by PCR for cloning ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"268t3","text":"Reagents:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":9},{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7jmla","text":"Taq Polymerase (Thermofisher, 11304011)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6slg5","text":"dNTPs","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4qtb2","text":"PCR Primers","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9algh","text":"Plasmid","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"alo7","text":"Nuclease Free H20","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bjihk","text":"Wizard SV Gel and PCR Purification Kit (Promega, A9282)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"673hr","text":"DpnI (NEB, R0176L)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bvfdc","text":"10x Cutsmart Buffer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 1. Set up PCR Reaction: 2. Run PCR Conditions: a) 95 °C , 00:02:00 b) 95 °C , 00:00:30 c) 60 °C , 00:00:30 d) 72 °C , 00:02:00 e) Repeat step B-D 35 times f) 72 °C , 00:10:00 g) 4 °C , hold *Annealing Temp and Extension time will differ based on PCR design 3. After reaction, take 5 µL of product and add 1 µL of gel loading buffer and run on 1% agarose gel to make sure there is a correct PCR product. 4. Add 5 µL of Cutsmart buffer and 1 µL of DpnI to the reaction and incubate at 37 °C for 00:15:00 . This is remove the plasmid template from mixture. 5. Purify Band from gel with Promega Wizard SV Gel and PCR Purification Kit (A9282) a) https://www.promega.com/products/nucleic-acid-extraction/clean-up-and-concentration/wizard-sv-gel-and-pcr-clean-up-system/?catNum=A9281 b) Weigh DNA gel fragment and add 10 µL of Membrane Binding Solution per 10 mg of gel slice. c) Incubate mixture at 65 °C for 00:10:00 or until gel is completely melted. d) Add melted gel mixture to SV minicolumn in Collection Tube and incubate at room temperature for 00:01:00 . e) Centrifuge at max speed for 00:01:00 . Discard flowthrough and reinsert column into tube. f) Add 700 µL of Membrane Wash Solution. Centrifuge at max speed for 00:01:00 . Discard flowthrough and reinsert column into tube. g) Add 500 µL of membrane wash solution. Centrifuge at max speed for 00:01:00 . Discard flowthrough and reinsert column into tube. h) Spin empty column for 00:01:00 at max speed to remove excess ethanol. i) Transfer column to labelled 1.5 mL tube and add 35 µL of NF H 2 0. Incubate for 00:01:00 at room temperature. j) Centrifuge at max speed for 00:01:00 . Keep eluate and store at -20 °C .
creator: Cecilia Escudero
